# Scope of Work — Constitution · Foundational Standards

**Layer:** Constitution · Foundational Standards
**Owner:** Delivery Lead
**Status:** Draft
**Last reviewed:** 2026-05-13
**Arabic mirror:** [scope_of_work_AR.md](./scope_of_work_AR.md)

## Context
This is the canonical Scope of Work (SOW) template for any Dealix
engagement. It is the contractual artifact tying offer to delivery. It
references the Delivery Standard
(`docs/delivery/DELIVERY_STANDARD.md`), the Scope Control rules
(`docs/delivery/SCOPE_CONTROL.md`), and the Quality Standard
(`docs/quality/QUALITY_STANDARD_V1.md`). Every SOW must cite the
Operating Constitution (`docs/DEALIX_OPERATING_CONSTITUTION.md`) by
reference.

## Section 1 — Parties
- **Client**: `<legal name>` (the "Client").
- **Dealix**: Dealix Saudi (the "Provider").
- **Effective date**: `<date>`.
- **SOW ID**: `<SOW-NNNN>`.

## Section 2 — Problem Statement
One paragraph in plain language describing the business problem
this engagement addresses. Quote the intake form where applicable.

## Section 3 — Deliverables
List the specific deliverables, each with an owner, due date, and
acceptance criteria.

| # | Deliverable | Owner | Due | Acceptance |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `<text>` | `<text>` | `<date>` | `<text>` |
| 2 | `<text>` | `<text>` | `<date>` | `<text>` |
| 3 | `<text>` | `<text>` | `<date>` | `<text>` |

## Section 4 — NOT Included
Explicitly list out-of-scope items. Any item not listed here as
out-of-scope and not in Section 3 is at the discretion of the
delivery lead per the Scope Control rules.

- `<text>`
- `<text>`
- `<text>`

## Section 5 — Timeline
- Kickoff: `<date>`
- Stage gates and milestones (use Delivery Lifecycle defaults).
- Final delivery: `<date>`.
- Proof pack: `<date>`.

## Section 6 — Inputs From Client
- Data sources and access by `<date>`.
- Approver availability per cadence.
- Subject matter expert availability.
- Workspace provisioning by `<date>`.

## Section 7 — Price
- Total fee: `<currency amount>`.
- Payment schedule: `<text>`.
- Hourly rate for change requests: `<currency amount>`.
- Currency: SAR (default).
- VAT and ZATCA terms: per
  `docs/INVOICING_ZATCA_READINESS.md`.

## Section 8 — Success Metrics
- Hero metric: `<text>`.
- Baseline: `<text>`.
- Target: `<text>`.
- Measurement source: `<text>`.
- Reporting cadence: `<text>`.

## Section 9 — Governance Flags
- Action classes anticipated: `<A | B | C | D>`.
- PII present: `<yes/no>` with lawful basis `<text>`.
- Approval routing: `<text>`.
- Forbidden-action review completed (initial pass): `<yes/no>`.
- DPA reference: `docs/DPA_DEALIX_FULL.md`.

## Section 10 — Acceptance And Sign-Off
The engagement is complete when:
- All deliverables in Section 3 meet acceptance criteria.
- A proof pack is delivered with hero metric tied to audit events.
- Client sponsor signs the delivery note.

Signatures:
- Client sponsor: `<name, title, date>`.
- Dealix delivery lead: `<name, date>`.
- Dealix founder (countersign): `<name, date>`.

## Interfaces
| Inputs | Outputs | Owners | Cadence |
|---|---|---|---|
| Intake form | Draft SOW | Delivery lead | Per engagement |
| Pricing rules | Final price | Revenue | Per engagement |
| Governance pre-assessment | Governance flags | Governance lead | Per engagement |
| Signed SOW | Project record | Delivery lead | Per engagement |

## Metrics
- **SOW cycle time** — days from intake to signed SOW. Target: ≤ 5.
- **SOW deviation rate** — projects with material variance from SOW
  at close. Target: ≤ 10%.
- **Acceptance pass rate on first review** — Target: ≥ 80%.
